mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id AS boardId, b.title, COUNT(p.post_id) AS postCount FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_post p ON b.board_id = p.fk_board_id AND p.post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.IS_HIDDEN = 0 GROUP BY b.board_id, b.title ORDER BY b.board_id

SELECT post_id AS postId, title, view_count AS viewCount, board_title AS boardTitle FROM ( SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.view_count, b.title AS board_title FROM tbl_post p JOIN tbl_board b ON p.fk_board_id = b.board_id WHERE p.post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.IS_HIDDEN = 0 ORDER BY p.view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT post_id AS postId, title, view_count AS viewCount FROM ( SELECT post_id, title, view_count FROM tbl_post WHERE created_at >= SYSDATE - 7 AND post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_post WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comment WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_post ( post_id, fk_board_id, fk_memberid, title, content, post_status, view_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(post_id), 0) + 1 FROM tbl_post), #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, 'ACTIVE', 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.fk_board_id AS boardId, b.title AS boardTitle, p.title, p.content, p.fk_memberid AS memberId, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM tbl_post p JOIN tbl_board b ON p.fk_board_id = b.board_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
SELECT post_id AS postId, title FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id = ( SELECT MAX(post_id) FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id < #{postId} AND post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 )
SELECT post_id AS postId, title FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id = ( SELECT MIN(post_id) FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id > #{postId} AND post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 )
SELECT reason_id AS reasonId, reason_name AS reasonName FROM tbl_report_reason
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_report ( report_id, target_type, target_id, fk_memberid, fk_reason_id, report_content, process_status, created_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(report_id), 0) + 1 FROM tbl_report), #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{memberId}, #{reasonId}, #{reportContent}, '처리중', SYSDATE )
